title: Bridge Essay: Nondual Awareness and the Whole Person.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Nondual, Awareness, and, the, Whole.

**Nondual Awareness and the Whole Person.** — Glob Adv Health Med. PMID: 32499967. DOI: 10.1177/2164956120914600. Integrative Health aims to treat the whole person and to do so within the context of whole systems and practices. We raise questions as to what constitutes the whole person and what must be taken into account to support the creation of optimal well-being. We propose that in order to fully account for the whole person, the transcendent aspects of human awareness, the development of which is the goal of many meditative traditions, must be taken into account.
